name: search_get
description: Search Spotify's catalog for tracks, artists, albums, playlists, shows, and episodes by keyword. Supports field filters for year, genre, and market.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query keyword. Supports field filters like artist:, album:, track:, year:, genre:.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of types to search: 'album','artist','playlist','track','show','episode'.

parameters.name: market
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to limit results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max results per type. Default: 20. Range: 1-50.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Index of first result. Default: 0. Max: 1000.

parameters.name: include_external
parameters.description: Set to 'audio' to include externally-hosted audio.

album.name: Relaxin With The Miles Davis Quintet
